title: FOOD HEROS - 211info
text: HEART OF OREGON CORPS FOOD HEROS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers youth employment program to learn skills and contribute to the community by growing fresh produce to provide to community organizations like the Madras Food Pantry and Meals on Wheels. Program offers hands-on experience, certifications in supply chain, warehousing, logistics, and food handling. 1291 NE 5th Street Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Ages 17-24 "opportunity youth" without school or work Hours: Daily 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 633-7834 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 633-7834 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Varies AREA SERVED: Jefferson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Youth Employment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - CENTRAL OREGON YOUTH CONSERVATION CORPS EMPLOYMENT - GO! LEAD EMPLOYMENT - HIGH DESERT CONSERVATION CORPS EMPLOYMENT - YEAR-ROUND PROGRAMS EMPLOYMENT - YOUTHBUILD If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
